collectionId.description: The ID of the Collection to add items to.

name.description: The optional name of the Collection item.

description.description: A helpful description of why this CollectionItem is in the Collection that it's in.

icon.description: The emoji icon for this CollectionItem. Only used for Text type items.

url.description: The URL of the item being added.

documentId.description: The Glean Document ID of the item being added if it's an indexed document.

newNextItemId.description: The (optional) ItemId of the next CollectionItem in sequence. If omitted, will be added to the end of the Collection

addedCollectionItemDescriptors.description: The CollectionItemDescriptors of the items being added.
